title: Command-authorized non-owners could reach owner-only /config and /debug surfaces
description: The handleConfigCommand and handleDebugCommand handlers in commands-config.ts check only whether the sender is authorized (rejectUnauthorizedCommand) but do not verify that the sender is the owner. Any authorized but non-owner user (such as a command-authorized chat member) can use /config set, /config unset, and all /debug subcommands to read and modify the application configuration or set runtime debug overrides.
